overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval rural village, along a waterfront beach, and crossing a wooden bridge. The scene features bright summer lighting, traditional wooden and stone architecture, and transitions from dirt paths to sandy shores.

scene_state.functional_zone: village dirt path with wooden fences and stone buildings

events.description: approaching waterfront, lake water and distant stone tower become visible

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the village path carrying swords on his back

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence lining the left side of the dirt path
large stone building with wooden overhangs on the right
unpaved dirt trail through the village
small cottage with straw thatched roof visible through trees
tall evergreen trees in the background

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path through a rural medieval village, passing wooden fences and stone buildings. The path leads toward a distant lake with a stone tower visible on the horizon.

events.description: ground surface changes from dirt to sand, reaching the waterfront area

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy beach toward the water's edge, passing wooden docks

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor standing by the dock holding a spear

entered.detail: wooden dock structure extending over the water
calm blue lake water with gentle ripples
tall cylindrical stone tower with conical roof across the lake
sandy shoreline along the water's edge
wooden platform extending from the shore

segments.scene_description: Geralt reaches the waterfront, walking on sand past a wooden dock where a guard stands watch. The beach opens to a wide view of the lake with a prominent stone tower and wooden bridge visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront warehouse area with overhanging stone structure

events.description: moving under the stone building overhang, creating shadow and diffused light
Geralt turns left away from the waterfront to head back inland

agents.ego_description: walking along the shoreline under building overhangs, examining the dock area before turning inland

entered.detail: large stone building with arched entrance and wooden dock
stacked wooden barrels on the dock platform
extended wooden pier structure with posts

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks under the shadow of a large stone warehouse with wooden docks and barrels, then turns left away from the water to head back toward the village interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: village path with thatched cottages and wooden fences

events.description: transitioning from sandy beach back to dirt path with grass and vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking inland through the village past cottages and wooden carts

entered.detail: small wooden rowboat beached on the shore
traditional wooden cottage with straw roof
wooden wagon with large wheels parked near the cottage
small wooden footbridge crossing a stream in the distance

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path away from the water, passing a beached wooden boat and traditional thatched cottages. A wooden cart sits near the path as the terrain becomes grassy with scattered trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: small wooden bridge crossing a stream

events.description: stepping onto the wooden bridge over the stream

agents.ego_description: crossing the small wooden footbridge over the stream

entered.detail: narrow stream flowing beneath the wooden bridge

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches and crosses a small wooden bridge over a narrow stream. The wooden planks of the bridge replace the dirt path as he crosses to the other side of the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins in a rural medieval village, ventures along a sunny waterfront, and eventually returns inland to cross a wooden bridge. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path past wooden fences and stone buildings, moving steadily toward a distant lake and a horizon-bound stone tower. As the terrain shifts to sand, the camera follows him past a wooden dock and a standing guard, opening up to a wide view of the lake before passing under the shadow of a large stone warehouse filled with barrels. The scene then turns away from the water, gliding past a beached wooden boat and thatched cottages as the sandy shore gives way to grassy fields and scattered trees. Finally, the dirt path transitions into wooden planks as Geralt approaches and crosses a small bridge over a narrow stream.
